_comment: AAC v2.0 Reference Instance — Financial Services Analytics Agent, L1 Foundational. Policy engine sidecar governing a LangGraph agent runtime. Satisfies all L1 required fields only. No L2/L3 optional fields. See AAC_v2.0_DRAFT.md for governing principles.

trust_tier_definitions.label: Probationary
trust_tier_definitions.graduation_criteria: 30 days operation; accuracy >= 0.92; zero override events; CISO sign-off

trust_tier_definitions.label: Restricted
trust_tier_definitions.graduation_criteria: 60 days at Tier 1; accuracy >= 0.95; false positive rate < 0.03; zero Tier 2 violations; CISO sign-off
demotion_triggers: False positive rate > 0.05 on rolling 7-day window
More than 3 override events in 30 days

trust_tier_definitions.label: Standard
demotion_triggers: More than 2 override events in 30 days

harm_classification._comment: Financial services harm taxonomy per AAC-DA-59. Pre-classified action registry enables O(1) runtime lookup.

tier_definitions.label: IRREVERSIBLE
tier_definitions.description: Permanent, unrecoverable harm. No remediation path once executed.

tier_definitions.label: MATERIAL
tier_definitions.description: Significant but recoverable harm. Requires human approval or reversal.

tier_definitions.label: FRICTION
tier_definitions.description: Transient, recoverable impact. Logged and monitored; does not block action.

pre_classified_actions.rationale: Read-only external data retrieval; no write operation
Internal output influencing credit or investment decisions
Regulatory output; errors have compliance consequences
Initiates financial movement; reversible with effort
Irrevocable transfer of funds; permanent financial effect
Account state change; correctable but may affect customer
Governed by ZT-77; provenance verified before connection
Creates governed sub-agent; covenant must be subset of parent

foreseeable_harm_signals.description: Transaction matching declared fraud pattern receives risk score below escalation threshold without analyst review
foreseeable_harm_signals.required_response: Immediate escalation to compliance queue; transaction held pending review
foreseeable_harm_signals.detection_mechanism: Risk scoring output compared against fraud pattern registry on every scored transaction

foreseeable_harm_signals.description: Transaction > $50,000 with risk score > 0.75 without escalation within 15 minutes of scoring
foreseeable_harm_signals.required_response: Automatic escalation to SecOps lead; transaction placed in pending status
foreseeable_harm_signals.detection_mechanism: Time-windowed monitor on scored high-value transactions; triggers if escalation absent within window

foreseeable_harm_signals.description: Compliance reporting deadline within 24 hours without required report generated for flagged account
foreseeable_harm_signals.required_response: Escalate to CISO; generate draft compliance report immediately for human completion
foreseeable_harm_signals.detection_mechanism: Regulatory deadline calendar cross-referenced against report generation audit log daily at 08:00 UTC

authority_registry._comment: Three principals; non-circular chain per AAC-OG-28. All five required scope classes covered.

principals.revocation_conditions: Role change, departure, or security incident

principals._comment: Verified governance system — policy engine compliance service. Satisfies DA-60 and DP-07 deterministic and auditable decision requirements.
principals.revocation_conditions: Service version deprecation, integrity verification failure, or CISO revocation

agent_registry.agent_function: Real-time financial risk scoring, compliance report generation, and transaction escalation

integration_registry._comment: All approved integrations pre-declared. Dynamic discovery disabled at L1.

approved_integrations.name: Internal Financial Document Vector Store
approved_integrations.provenance_verification: Cryptographically signed manifest; internal certificate authority
approved_integrations.failure_fallback: Return cached safe response; flag assessment as incomplete
approved_integrations.escalation_trigger: Unavailable > 15 minutes — escalate to SecOps lead

approved_integrations.name: External Market Data API
approved_integrations.provenance_verification: Vendor certificate; mutual authentication on every connection
approved_integrations.failure_fallback: Return cached market data with staleness flag; do not proceed to risk scoring for Tier 2 actions

approved_integrations.name: Internal Audit Log Service
approved_integrations.provenance_verification: Cryptographically signed API certificate; internal certificate authority
approved_integrations.failure_fallback: Halt all agent actions; buffer audit events locally; immediate SecOps lead alert
approved_integrations.escalation_trigger: Immediate — audit log failure is a Tier 2 governance event

fallback_registry.safe_by_construction_rationale: Action not executed. Denial record written to audit log with harm tier, control ID, and timestamp. No side effects. System state unchanged.
fallback_registry.recovery_rationale: Denial is the recovery — no partial commitment to undo. Audit record enables full reconstruction per AAC-DA-61.

fallback_registry.safe_by_construction_rationale: Action suspended, not cancelled. Review ticket created with full context. No financial state modified pending review.
fallback_registry.recovery_rationale: Suspension preserves action for human completion — satisfies AAC-DA-61 recovery requirement for Tier 2 actions.

fallback_registry.safe_by_construction_rationale: Returns cached validated read response or structured data-unavailable message. No write operations.
fallback_registry.recovery_rationale: Friction harm requires no compensation — safe response satisfies liveness guarantee per AAC-DA-61.

fallback_registry.safe_by_construction_rationale: Triggers declared transaction reversal workflow for any partially committed financial action. Idempotent and logged.
fallback_registry.recovery_rationale: Direct recovery path for Tier 2 financial actions per AAC-DA-61 recovery requirement.

system_constraints._comment: L1 constraints — four required fields only. Safe mode and cyclical interaction are L2 additions.

escalation_hierarchy.scope_of_authority: Tier 2 action approval and rejection; transaction pending and release; risk score override
All decisions including Tier 1 approval; trust tier changes; sovereign override; profile changes

enforcement_gates._comment: Gate 1 — Portfolio query. Tier 3 friction — ZT+Audit path only.
Gate 2 — Market data retrieval. Tier 3 friction. ZT-77 provenance verified before data enters context.
Gate 3 — Risk report generation. Tier 2 material — confidence + override + policy path.
Gate 4 — Compliance report generation. Tier 2 material. Higher confidence threshold for regulatory context.
Gate 5 — Transaction initiation. Tier 2 material — escalates unconditionally. Agent cannot self-authorize per AAC-AI-12.
Gate 6 — Fund transfer. Tier 1 irreversible — full five-step sequence with DNH-A pre-gate. harm_tier_max FRICTION means IRREVERSIBLE classification produces immediate DENY.
Gate 7 — Account parameter modification. Tier 2 material — escalates unconditionally.
Gate 8 — External tool invocation. Tier 3 friction — ZT+Audit path. ZT-77 signed provenance verified before tool connection.
Gate 9 — Sub-agent spawn. Tier 2 material. Spawned agent operates at or below parent trust tier per AAC-AO-60.

context_interface_contract._comment: Assurance floor of 2 — local in-process memory alone insufficient for Tier 2 actions in this domain.

allowed_sources._comment: Primary RAG context source. Financial document corpus — regulatory filings, market data, internal policy.
In-process session state for within-session continuity only. Not used for Tier 2 action decisions.
